content: Google Places API legacy was frozen in March 2025 - feature-frozen, moving to eventual decommission with 12-month notice required. New Places API (New) breaking changes: (1) Only JSON response format supported. (2) Field masking required for Place Details/Nearby/Text Search. (3) JSON response structure changed. (4) Separate per-SKU free tiers replaced flat $200 credit. (5) New API has improved performance. Migration guide available. Developers starting new projects should use Places API (New) exclusively.
